reasoning_checks.name: Domain package completeness
reasoning_checks.reasoning: Examined order-management (3 entities, 10 endpoints, 3 screens, 3 features, 4 cross-domain contracts) and payment (2 entities, 6 endpoints, 2 screens, 4 features, 3 contracts). Both packages contain complete entity data with all attributes, relationships, business_rules verbatim from entities.json. Endpoints include full request/response shapes and business rules. Write_scope covers all files a builder would need. Acceptance criteria are specific and testable.

reasoning_checks.name: Cross-domain contract actionability
reasoning_checks.reasoning: Analyzed UF-001 (Complete Order-to-Payment Flow) across order-management, kitchen, payment, and inventory. Steps are covered across domains without gaps (order-management steps 1,3 -> kitchen steps 4,7,9 -> payment step 11). Handoff points are clear: order submission triggers kitchen queue and inventory deduction; kitchen ready creates notification for waiter; payment closes the cycle. Timing note for stock deduction is consistently specified. Minor weakness: some contract legs (kitchen UF-001, menu UF-001) have empty timing_notes, but context fields compensate adequately.

summary: 24/24 checks passed. 0 issues found. All 12 domain packages exist with correct structure, waves, entity coverage, endpoint verbatim copies, valid cross-domain contracts, and correct state dependencies. Reasoning: 2/2 pass. No blocking issues.
